title: Badge Component
content:
The `Badge` component is a simple, customizable UI element used to display status, labels, or categories. It leverages `class-variance-authority` for flexible styling based on variants and provides integration with Tailwind CSS for utility classes. ## Key Exports * **`Badge`**: The main React component for rendering a badge. * **`badgeVariants`**: A function from `class-variance-authority` that generates CSS class names based on provided variants. ## Props The `Badge` component accepts the following props: * **`variant`**: (Optional) Defines the visual style of the badge. Accepts one of the following values: * `default`: The primary badge style. * `secondary`: A secondary badge style. * `destructive`: A badge style typically used for error or warning states. * `outline`: A badge with an outline border and no background color. * Defaults to `default`. * **`className`**: (Optional) Additional CSS classes to apply to the badge. * **`...props`**: Standard HTML attributes for a `div` element. ## Usage Example ```tsx import { Badge } from '@/components/ui/badge'; function MyComponent() { return (
Default Badge Secondary Error Outline With Custom Class
); } export default MyComponent; ```
